nasb.text: always giving thanks for all things in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to God, even the Father;

esv.text: giving thanks always and for everything to God the Father in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ,

cnv.text: 凡事要奉我們主耶穌基督的名，常常感謝父　神，

ccb.text: 凡事总要奉我们主耶稣基督的名感谢父上帝。

csbs.text: 奉我们主耶稣基督的名， 为一切常常感谢父神；
